Game Dev Tycoon

Build your game development empire from a humble garage in the 1980s! Create and release games, research new technologies, and grow your company. Balance your resources between Design, Tech, and Marketing to create hit games. Earn money, unlock new game types, and compete against rival companies to become the industry leader. Win by reaching $50,000 and maintaining your reputation!

Controls:
Arrow Up/Down: Navigate menu options | Space: Select / Confirm | Z: Fast-forward development | Shift: View stats (hold) | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart | Enter: Start game
